title: Rich Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering and Analytics

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Rich Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering and Analytics

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`
* `#090a0f`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='50' y='20' width='300' height='260' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='100' y='40' width='200' height='180' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='150' y='60' width='80' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='50' y='20' width='20' height='20' fill='#411C56'/><text x='80' y='150' font-size='20' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Media Categories</text><text x='300' y='150' font-size='20' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Sorting Options</text><text x='150' y='100' font-size='16' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Filter by</text><g transform='translate(220, 200)'><circle cx='20' cy='20' r='10' fill='#C06C88'/><path d='M 20 20 L 30 30'/><path d='M 30 20 L 20 30'/></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must implement a responsive layout that scales perfectly within a 400x300 viewport
Must be fully interactive with state updates and dynamic filtering

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Rich Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering and Analytics

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, dynamic filtering, and sorting options.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
